com.mentor.chs.plugin.query

Interface IXSBOMContextResultExpression

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXCustomExpression, IXCustomResultExpression, IXPlugin, IXResultExpression

    public interface IXSBOMContextResultExpression
extends IXCustomResultExpression
    Interface for implementing a custom result expression for a particular SBOM container.

    • Nested Class Summary

      • Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.query.IXCustomExpression

        IXCustomExpression.Context

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.Object evaluate(IXObject entity, IXSBOMEvaluationContext context)
      Evaluate a custom result for a given object and SBOM container

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.plugin.query.IXCustomExpression

        getApplicableContexts

        getDescription, getName, getVersion

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.query.IXResultExpression

        evaluate, evaluate, getName

    • Method Detail

      • evaluate

        java.lang.Object evaluate(IXObject entity,
                          IXSBOMEvaluationContext context)
        Evaluate a custom result for a given object and SBOM container

        Example : 

                 Collection<? extends IXSubAssembly> children = context.getCurrentSubAssembly().getChildren();
        // If both connector & wire end are children of the current sub, it's OK
        if (connectorOwner != wireEndOwner && children.contains(connectorOwner) &&
                children.contains(wireEndOwner)) {
                String length = xWireEnd.getConductor().getAttribute("modifiedlength");
                if (length != null && !length.trim().isEmpty()) {
                        return CONST * Double.parseDouble(length);
            }
      }
        return null;
        Parameters:
        entity - on which to evaluate the expression.
        context - - SBOM Evaluation context.
        Returns:
        result value
